title: Boat Rental in Penang: A Complete Guide for 2026
html:
Penang offers exceptional boating around its tropical shores, with trips departing from Teluk Bahang and prices starting from 350 MYR for a half-day. BoatHire24 connects travellers to verified boat rentals across the island, making it simple to plan a day on the water.

Where to set off in Penang

Most boat trips in Penang start from one of several well-served marinas and jetties. The largest facility is the Straits Quay Marina in Tanjung Tokong, which accommodates yachts and motorboats of all sizes. The Penang Yacht Club on the island's north coast provides a sheltered launch point for crewed charters. Smaller operators use the jetty at Batu Maung, near the second bridge, for fishing trips and island-hopping to Pulau Rimau. For northern routes, the jetty at Teluk Bahang is the main departure point for trips to Pulau Pinang's remote beaches. A journey from Straits Quay to the Monkey Beach anchorage covers roughly 8 nautical miles and takes about 30 minutes at cruising speed. You can book a charter online in a few minutes.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Penang?

Prices vary from 150 MYR for a shared tour to over 2,500 MYR for a full-day crewed yacht. A typical half-day rental for a small motorboat, such as the Olympic 490, costs between 350 and 600 MYR. For a faster option, a Sunseeker day boat for up to eight people starts at 1,200 MYR for four hours. Those looking for luxury can charter a Lagoon 42 catamaran from 2,000 MYR for a full day, including a skipper and fuel. A crewed Azimut 55 flybridge yacht for a full-day private excursion with lunch is usually around 3,500 MYR. To compare verified boat listings at these price points, you can book a charter online through the BoatHire24 platform. One option worth a look is the Olympic 490 for hire.

Which boat to rent in Penang

  1. Speedboat (e.g. Olympic 490), best for fast island-hopping and watersports, seats 4-6, from 350 MYR for a half-day. Check the Olympic 490 for hire on BoatHire24 to see specifications and availability.
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Azimut or Sunseeker), ideal for groups wanting comfort and range, seats 8-10, from 1,200 MYR for a half-day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), stable and spacious for families or parties, seats 10-12, from 2,000 MYR for a full day.
  4. Fishing boat, purpose-built for angling trips near Pulau Kendi, seats 4-6, from 400 MYR for a half-day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Penang?

No licence is required for bareboat rentals of boats under 15 metres with a small outboard, but the operator will confirm exact requirements. For larger vessels or crewed charters, a skipper is always included. The high season runs from December to February, when the northeast monsoon brings calm seas and steady winds from the east. A local tip: book early morning trips in January to avoid the afternoon thunder-shower pattern. You can also see more at check availability.

If you plan to visit Pulau Jerejak, allow at least two hours for the crossing from Batu Maung and bring reef-safe sunscreen.

At a glance

  • Price band: 150, 3,500 MYR per trip
  • Peak months: December to February
  • Typical trip length: 4, 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: up to 12 on most charters
  • Currency: Malaysian Ringgit (MYR)

Questions about boat rental in Penang

Can I rent a boat in Penang without a skipper?

For small motorboats up to 6 guests, bareboat rental is possible without a licence, but the operator will always verify your experience level before confirming the booking.

What is the best time of year for boating in Penang?

The best weather occurs between December and February, when the northeast monsoon delivers flat seas and sunny mornings, though afternoon showers are common.

How long does it take to reach Monkey Beach from Straits Quay?

The journey covers approximately 8 nautical miles and takes around 30 minutes by speedboat, making it a popular half-day excursion from the marina.

Are there sunset cruises available in Penang?

Yes, several operators offer sunset cruises departing from Straits Quay and Teluk Bahang, typically lasting two hours and costing from 200 MYR per person with drinks and snacks provided.

To start planning your trip, use the boat search on BoatHire24 to filter by date, size and price. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Penang or list your own. If you own a boat in Penang, list your boat on the platform and check availability through the BoatHire24 dashboard.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Penang and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
